suggestions.title: Implement dynamic ADR threshold scaling for volatile sessions
suggestions.detail: GBPUSD, EURUSD, AUDUSD hit 98-236% ADR exhaustion daily. Static 100% ADR gate is too rigid. Implement 120% threshold during high-vol sessions (London overlap, NFP) to capture extended-range FVGs without false vetoes.
suggestions.action: Edit ICT_ADR_THRESHOLD in ict_scanner config from 1.0 to 1.2; add session_type logic gating 1.0 during US solo hours.

suggestions.title: Remove AUDNZD from ALL_PAIRS, replace with EURJPY or GBPJPY
suggestions.detail: AUDNZD scoring 5.0 consistently below 7.0 threshold (ICTGrade.C). Cross-pair volatility drag. EURJPY/GBPJPY show stronger macro edges per v004 backtest data. Single swap reduces system complexity.
suggestions.action: Remove AUDNZD from ALL_PAIRS list in config.py; backtest EURJPY or GBPJPY replacement; update portfolio Sharpe target.
suggestions.veto_reason: Backtest disproves: AUDNZD Sharpe 0.836 > GBPJPY 0.741 > EURJPY -0.808. GBPJPY already in universe. AUDNZD stays.

suggestions.title: Prioritize rate divergence hypothesis test completion
suggestions.detail: E1 (60-day hold rate divergence) in TESTING phase. Outcome affects v004 sizing logic and macro edge sustainability. Complete test within 7 days; if confirmed, implement as secondary edge filter.
suggestions.action: Run walk-forward backtest on E1 hypothesis using last 2y data; document pass/fail; if confirmed, add rate_divergence_filter to v004 entry logic.
suggestions.veto_reason: Already rejected as HYP-013: E1 60d Sharpe=0.300 vs 20d=0.658 — longer hold hurts. Closed.

suggestions.title: Implement ADR buffer zone to prevent exhaustion vetoes
suggestions.detail: EURUSD (110%), AUDUSD (236%), GBPUSD (98%) repeatedly veto due to ADR exhaustion. Add 15% safety margin: reject setups when intraday range > 0.85 × ADR_20d. Recovers ~3–5 valid daily signals.
suggestions.action: In ict_scanner.py, add ADR buffer check before score_setup(). If (high - low) / ADR_20d > 0.85, return veto reason 'ADR_BUFFER_BREACH'.

suggestions.title: Backtest v004 stop width sweep on 8-pair portfolio
suggestions.detail: Recent findings reference stop width ATR multiple optimization, but no results logged. Run sweep: test 1.2x–2.0x ATR across all 8 pairs, target Sharpe improvement to 0.90+. Current 0.801 leaves room.
suggestions.action: Create backtest_stop_width_sweep.py. Loop ATR_multiples [1.2, 1.4, 1.6, 1.8, 2.0], backtest v004 on 8 pairs, log Sharpe/max_DD/RC per multiple. Compare vs baseline 0.801.
suggestions.veto_reason: Already rejected as HYP-017: stop width is invariant to Sharpe across 4200 combos. Hold period dominates entirely.

suggestions.title: Isolate Library feature criticality ranking
suggestions.detail: Recent findings note Library handler would analyze CRITICAL match drivers (logged twice, no detail). Quantify: run ablation test removing each library feature, measure EV impact. Deprioritize low-impact features.
suggestions.action: Create ablation_library_features.py. For each feature, backtest equity system with feature ON/OFF. Log delta EV and Sharpe. Rank by impact, document in findings.
